name: Herbed Sardine Spread
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 oz Can of sardines, packed in oil, drained
1 tsp Fresh lemon juice, or to taste
Crackers or toast points as an accompaniment
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mash together the sardines, cream cheese, parsley, scallion, and lemon juice.
2. Add pepper to taste.
3. Serve the spread with crackers. Makes about 1/2 cup, serving 2.
